result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  Hopp generate <engine> [options]

Arguments:
  <engine>  The type of engine. Supported values: 'source' or 'target'.

Options:
  --input <input>              The XML File corresponding to the published project.
  --projectFile <projectFile>  The path to the csproj file (for Source Engine the EngineCustom project csproj file)
  --formatCSharp               Format generated C# files. [default: False]
  --verbose                    Verbose mode [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  Hopp generate <engine> [options]

Arguments:
  <engine>  The type of engine. Supported values: 'source' or 'target'.

Options:
  --input <input>              The XML File corresponding to the published project.
  --projectFile <projectFile>  The path to the csproj file (for Source Engine the EngineCustom project csproj file)
  --formatCSharp               Format generated C# files. [default: False]
  --verbose                    Verbose mode [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
